title: rpc authusers signup signin flow
description: Test the signup and signin process using the RPC auth.users endpoint with valid and invalid credentials, verifying correct status codes and session tokens are returned.

title: profile management with publicusuarios endpoint
description: Verify that authenticated users can retrieve and update their profile via GET and UPDATE on public.usuarios, and that unauthorized access is denied.

title: fetch available time slots for service and date
description: Test the RPC public.buscar_horarios_com_multiplos_intervalos endpoint anonymously with valid and invalid inputs to ensure correct available slots are returned or validation errors are handled.

title: create public booking in agendamentosonline
description: Verify anonymous users can create public bookings by inserting into public.agendamentos_online with valid customer data and receive booking confirmation, and that missing required fields cause validation errors.

title: convert public booking to internal appointment
description: Test the RPC public.converter_agendamento_online endpoint with valid booking_id and admin token to convert public bookings, and verify unauthorized calls are rejected.

title: manage financial transactions with lancamentosfinanceiros
description: Test authenticated CRUD operations on public.lancamentos_financeiros with valid and invalid data, ensuring correct creation, validation errors, and authorization enforcement.

title: retrieve financial summary with resumofinanceiro view
description: Verify that authenticated users can retrieve tenant-scoped financial summaries via public.resumo_financeiro and unauthorized access is denied.

title: client management crud operations
description: Test authenticated CRUD operations on public.clientes ensuring tenant isolation, correct creation, update, deletion, and proper error handling for non-existent clients.
